that won't last very long
mmm hmm
not really, but sort of
must try those now

smart
as is tradition
cool?
hotel breakfast is usually great especially if there's a person making omelets
finally
that's relatable
ok
i guess
sure why not
foiled again
is it though?
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Transgenderism gives an unfair advantage at -checks notes- darts
item.description:
First off, why is darts even a gendered sport at all? It's darts. A thing one can do while drinking and or drunk. Is it like chess where the concerns are that male players get more experience due to more likely exposure and the concern that female players would be intimidated?
"Deta Hedman, who has twice refused to play transender opponents, had pulled out of a match in May against Van Leuven over the effect that being forced to play a trans woman had on her “mental health”." We also need to do something about people co-opting legitimate words to hide their bigotry behind.
Explaining she had pulled out of May’s match against Van Leuven over the effect that being forced to play a trans woman had on her “mental health”, she added: “It’s been affecting me for a very, very long time. And, when it did happen, I just broke down. I was a mess, an absolute mess.” Hedman, who has launched a petition against darts’ current gender participation policy, accused the WDF of putting the mental welfare of trans women ahead of those born female. “They haven’t shown any regard for the mental health of anyone female-born at all,” she said. “It’s all about the mental health of transgender women.
item.dc:creator: AranaDiscoteca

item.title: The Kalyazin RT-64 radio-telescope.
item.description: The Kalyazin RT-64 radio-telescope built in the USSR to communicate with robotic craft sent to Venus and Mars. The telescope was built with manned missions to Mars and Venus in mind, and though those missions never came to pass, the telescope remains operational today.
item.dc:creator: esberat

Mining diamonds.
Birds. My favorite one is the blue swallow #3.
An island in the Philippines.
item.dc:creator: Freespirit84

item.title: Homemade Salsa
item.description: Ingredients: - 1 can (28 oz) whole tomatoes with juice - 2 cans (10 oz each) Rotel diced tomatoes and green chilies - 1/4 cup chopped onion - 1 clove garlic, minced - 1 whole jalapeño, quartered and sliced thin - 1/4 teaspoon sugar - 1/4 teaspoon salt - 1/4 teaspoon ground cumin - 1/2 cup chopped cilantro (more to taste!) - Juice of 1/2 lime Directions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the whole tomatoes with their juice and the Rotel diced tomatoes and green chilies. 2. Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and sliced jalapeño to the bowl. 3. Sprinkle in the sugar, salt, and ground cumin. Stir everything together until well mixed. 4. Gently fold in the chopped cilantro, adjusting the amount to your taste. 5. Squeeze in the juice of half a lime and mix again. 6. Taste your salsa and adjust seasoning if needed; you can add more lime juice, salt, or cilantro if you like. 7. Let the salsa sit for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to blend beautifully. Your amazing homemade salsa is ready to enjoy! Serve it with chips or as a zesty topping for your favorite dishes!
item.dc:creator: mohamedjamii
